channel.title: SkillSync - AI-Powered Individual Development Plans
channel.description: Recent content on SkillSync - AI-Powered Individual Development Plans

item.title: About SkillSync
item.description:
Closing the Skills Gap with AI

We believe every employee deserves a personalized growth path. SkillSync makes that possible at scale.

Our Mission

To empower organizations to develop their people faster, smarter, and more equitably through AI-powered Individual Development Plans.

Faster

Reduce IDP creation time from hours to minutes, freeing HR teams to focus on strategic initiatives.

item.title: Contact Us
item.description:
Let’s Talk

Have questions about SkillSync? Want to see a demo? We’re here to help.

Get in Touch

Whether you’re exploring SkillSync for the first time or ready to transform your HR workflow, we’re excited to connect.

📧 Email

General Inquiries: hello@skillsync.ai We respond within 24 hours

Sales & Demos: sales@skillsync.ai For demos and enterprise inquiries

item.title: Pricing
item.description:
Simple, Transparent Pricing

Choose the plan that fits your organization. No hidden fees, no surprises. Cancel anytime.

🚀 Starter

$0/month - Up to 10 employees

Perfect for small teams trying out AI-powered IDPs

Features:

  • ✓ 10 IDP generations per month
  • ✓ Basic 70-20-10 templates
  • ✓ Email support
  • ✓ PDF export

Get Started Free

⭐ Growth (Most Popular)

$8/employee/month - Billed annually
